notes: Production release v0.6.0. Promotes v0.6.0-rc.1. All RC gates passed. v0.6 AI-native differentiation: four bounded, deterministic AI operator workflows delivered — call failure explanation, route and change risk analysis, recording/voicemail summary review, and natural-language telecom reporting. No DB schema changes from v0.5.0. All CI/smoke gates green.
helm_lint: Inherited from v0.5.0-rc.1. No Helm chart changes in v0.6. PASSED — 1 chart linted, 0 chart(s) failed. All 8 resource kinds render.
docker_compose_prod_smoke: Inherited from v0.5.0. No deployment changes in v0.6. All v0.6 features are additive read-only advisory endpoints on the existing API surface.

rotation_rehearsal.note: Inherited from v0.5.0. No auth middleware or token-handling changes in v0.6.

migrations: No new migrations in v0.6.0. Upgrade from v0.5.0 is a drop-in image replacement. Run `pnpm db:migrate` is a no-op for v0.5.0 → v0.6.0 upgrades.
production_soak: Inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/runtime-slo-evidence-2026-06-03.json). No call-path or hot-path changes in v0.6.
production_slo: Inherited from v0.3.0. No hot-path changes in v0.6.
carrier_interop: Inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/carrier-interop-evidence-fusionpbx-2026-06-02.json). No carrier or call-path changes in v0.6.
security_review: CodeQL run 27028893173 clean. FreeSWITCH smoke 27028911635 passed. Coverage 27028893142 passed. All v0.6 endpoints: read-only, capability-gated, no raw SQL, no external LLM calls, deterministic pattern matching only. No new privileged surfaces.
rollback_plan: Roll back to v0.5.0 image. No DB rollback needed — no migrations in v0.6. Low risk — all v0.6 changes are additive read-only advisory endpoints.

operator_signoff.name: Fatih Kucukpetek
operator_signoff.notes: Production signoff for v0.6.0. All four v0.6 AI-native differentiation features delivered and verified. All CI/smoke gates pass. No DB migrations, no call-path changes. Zero-downtime upgrade from v0.5.0.

remaining_operator_steps: Make GHCR v0.6.0 packages public: GitHub → Profile → Packages → Change visibility to Public
Run docker pull ghcr.io/gokbilge/managecallai-api:v0.6.0 to verify image is available
Deploy: update MANAGECALLAI_IMAGE_TAG=v0.6.0 in .env.production and restart containers
No DB migration required for v0.5.0 → v0.6.0 upgrade
